title: RoomLayout
description: Defines the complete layout, objects, and behavior of a single interior room in Alveus Sanctuary Keeping.

room_id.description: Unique machine-readable identifier for this room. Used as the enum variant in Rust (PascalCase derived from snake_case). Must match the BuildingEntrance variant name.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in the room title UI overlay.

spawn_point.description: The tile coordinate where the player spawns when entering this room. Must be a walkable floor tile adjacent to (but not on) the door.

exit_target.description: The tile coordinate on the overview map where the player spawns when exiting this room.

objects.description: All fixed interactable and non-interactable objects placed in the room.

animals.description: Animals that reside in this room. May be zero (e.g., HQ Office has no animals).

zones.description: Named rectangular zones within the room (e.g., Polly's Playpen). Zones define sub-areas with special rules.

dynamic_spawns.description: Objects that spawn procedurally each day (e.g., manure piles).

ambient.description: Room-specific ambient settings (floor color, wall color, lighting mood).

x.description: X coordinate in tile units (0-indexed from left).

y.description: Y coordinate in tile units (0-indexed from bottom in Bevy's coordinate system).

width.description: Total grid width in tiles (including walls). The interior walkable area is width-2.

height.description: Total grid height in tiles (including walls). The interior walkable area is height-2.

tile_size_px.description: Pixel size of each tile. Must match the global TILE_SIZE constant (currently 32).

style.description: 'perimeter' generates walls on all four edges automatically. 'custom' requires explicit wall_tiles.

excluded_tiles.description: Tiles on the perimeter that should NOT have walls (i.e., the door). Only used when style='perimeter'.

custom_tiles.description: Explicit list of wall tile coordinates. Only used when style='custom'.

style.description: 'fill_interior' fills all tiles inside the walls. 'custom' requires explicit tile list.

custom_tiles.description: Explicit list of floor tiles. Only used when style='custom'.

texture.description: Optional asset path to a floor texture (relative to assets/).

position.description: Tile coordinate of the door. This tile is walkable and triggers room exit when stepped on.

wall_side.description: Which wall the door is on. 'south' means y=0, 'north' means y=height-1, etc.

width_tiles.description: Width of the door opening in tiles.

object_id.description: Unique identifier for this object within its room.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in interaction prompts.

position.description: Tile coordinate where this object is placed.

size.description: Size of the object in tiles. Defaults to 1x1.

is_obstacle.description: If true, this object blocks player movement (gets the Obstacle component).

is_interactable.description: If true, pressing Space adjacent to this object triggers its interaction.

interaction.description: Defines what happens when the player interacts with this object. Required if is_interactable=true.

color.description: Placeholder color for the object mesh (used until sprite assets are available).

sprite.description: Optional asset path to the object's sprite (relative to assets/).

z_layer.description: Z-index for render ordering. Floor=0.0, door=0.01, walls=0.1, objects=0.2, player=1.0.

type.description: The category of interaction this object performs.

menu_id.description: For 'open_menu' type: identifier of the menu/UI to display.

chore_id.description: For 'mini_chore' type: identifier of the mini-chore to trigger.

item_id.description: For 'give_item' type: identifier of the item added to the satchel.

target_animal_id.description: For 'feed_animal'/'enrich_animal': the animal this interaction targets.

required_item_id.description: Item that must be in the satchel to perform this interaction. Null means no requirement.

stat_affected.description: Which animal stat this interaction modifies.

stat_delta.description: How much the stat increases (0.0 to 1.0 scale). 1.0 means fill to max.

prompt_text.description: Text shown to the player when the interaction prompt appears.

animal_id.description: References an animal defined in animals.json.

home_position.description: The tile where this animal idles by default.

wander_zone.description: Rectangular area the animal can wander within.

bounds.description: The rectangular bounds of this zone.

fence_sides.description: Which sides of the zone have fence obstacles. A gate opening is defined by gate_position.

gate_position.description: Tile coordinate of the gate opening in the fence (walkable gap).

object_template.description: The object_id template for spawned instances (e.g., 'manure_pile').

count.description: Random count range [min, max] spawned per daily reset.

spawn_area.description: Rectangular area where objects can spawn on free (non-obstacle, non-object) tiles.

interaction.description: The interaction triggered when the player cleans/interacts with a spawned instance.

TileRect.description: An axis-aligned rectangle defined by two tile coordinates (inclusive on both ends).

SrgbColor.description: Linear sRGB color with components in [0.0, 1.0]. Maps directly to Bevy's Color::srgb(r, g, b).

background_color.description: Color shown outside the room bounds (Bevy ClearColor equivalent).

music_track.description: Asset path to the room's ambient music track.
